reference: I was diagnosed with an irritated meniscus in my right knee. In June of two thousand and thirteen, I was going up some steps and banged my foot into the step on the way up. I couldn't walk and had multiple instances where my leg almost gave way under me. I am finally gaining some stability almost a year later. My question is, how long does an irritated meniscus normally take to recover?
text: I was diagnosed with an irritated meniscus in my right knee. In June of 2013, I was going up some steps and banged my foot into the step on the way up. I couldn't walk and had multiple instances where my leg almost gave way under me. I am finally gaining some stability almost a year later. My question is, how long does an irritated meniscus normally take to recover?
